kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petstore, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Get File For Streaming Upload
kw.doc: Opens and returns a file descriptor of a specified file to be passed as ``data`` parameter to other requests keywords.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet path_url=/v2/pet headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'api_key': '8728878237', 'Content-Length': '231'} body=<_io.BufferedReader name='C:\\AutomationSession\\AutomationProject\\files\\update_pet.json'>

C:\DemoProject\.venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'petstore.swagger.io'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
